_comment: Lunch spots Arnold offers on weekdays. Menus + macros come EXCLUSIVELY from the PragueMenus internal API (rpi1) — 'slug' is the praguemenus.com restaurant slug; fetch-menus.mjs asks the API (which scrapes politely and estimates macros) and never scrapes anything itself. To add a spot: get it listed on praguemenus.com first (it handles discovery/strategies), then add its slug here. 'note' is coach knowledge appended to the menu section.

spots.name: Nile House (next door)
spots.note: Teplý bufet = pay by weight; macros arrive per 100 g with 100/150/200 g rungs precomputed. Live cooking = fixed plates.

spots.name: Bufet Karlín
spots.note: Mostly burgers/fried — a treat spot, not cut-ideal.

spots.name: Karlín Osteria
spots.note: À la carte Italian, standing menu only.

spots.name: Queens Kebab
spots.note: Good high-protein fallback: order meat-heavy, easy on bread/fries.
